title: Jungle Fire
lesson: Deep in the jungle! Read every word carefully. You're almost to the volcano!
sentences: The fish swam in a tub.
The dog can sniff the mud.
The cat can nap on bed.
We can play in the yard.
The car is in the lot.
The bird can sing a song.
He can jump over the log.
She went to get her vest.
The storm hit hard last night.
We ran fast past the farm.
The girl hurt her hand first.
He sat on a big stump.
The frog can sit very still.
She got a gift from him.
We set up camp by dusk.
